message:
feat(agentmail): implement ListReservations API for file locks

Completes the Agent Mail file reservations API by implementing
ListReservations and wiring it into the locks and git status commands.

API Addition (internal/agentmail/tools.go):
- ListReservations(ctx, projectKey, agentName, allAgents)
  Lists active file reservations for a project, optionally filtered by agent.
  Returns error rather than empty slice when server doesn't support the tool,
  allowing CLI to surface the limitation accurately.

CLI Integration:
- ntm locks: Now fetches real reservation data from Agent Mail server
  instead of returning empty placeholder
- ntm git status: Shows active file locks alongside git status when
  Agent Mail is available

Error Handling:
- API errors propagated with context for debugging
- Server unavailability handled gracefully (empty locks, no error)
- Missing tool support explicitly reported vs silent empty results

This enables users to see which files are reserved by which agents,
preventing edit conflicts in multi-agent workflows.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 }

+	Branch        string `json:"branch"`
+	Error         string `json:"error,omitempty"`

 }
